subject: [PATCH v3 2/3] iomap: add helper to mark folio uptodate

2026-07-07.patch_summary: This patch adds a new helper function, `iomap_folio_mark_uptodate`, which marks a folio as uptodate and updates its uptodate bitmap if it has iomap state data attached. This is necessary for filesystems like fuse that need to mark a folio as uptodate outside of conventional iomap calls. The function simply calls the existing `iomap_set_range_uptodate` function with the entire folio range, making it an exported symbol. This patch addresses a specific use case where the iomap-internal uptodate bitmap needs to be synchronized with the folio's uptodate state.

reviews.author: Miklos Szeredi
reviews.summary: Raised a non-regression comment about the patch and asked Joanne to look into it.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, 8 Jul 2026 at 00:05, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> Add an exported helper iomap_folio_mark_uptodate() to mark a folio as
> uptodate and update its uptodate bitmap if the folio has iomap state
> data attached.

Sashiko has a non-regression comment about this:

https://sashiko.dev/#/patchset/20260707220450.1200943-1-joannelkoong%40gmail.com

Can you have a look, please?

Thanks,
Miklos

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Responded to Miklos' comment, mentioning that an underflow issue was fixed by a different patch but not yet merged.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Jul 8, 2026 at 2:17 AM Miklos Szeredi <miklos@szeredi.hu> wrote:
>
> On Wed, 8 Jul 2026 at 00:05, Joanne Koong <joannelkoong@gmail.com> wrote:
> >
> > Add an exported helper iomap_folio_mark_uptodate() to mark a folio as
> > uptodate and update its uptodate bitmap if the folio has iomap state
> > data attached.
>
> Sashiko has a non-regression comment about this:
>
> https://sashiko.dev/#/patchset/20260707220450.1200943-1-joannelkoong%40gmail.com
>
> Can you have a look, please?

I think this underflow issue was fixed by Zhang's patch in [1] that he
sent out in May but I don't think that has been merged yet. I'll
follow up on his series about the status of it.

Thanks,
Joanne

[1] https://lore.kernel.org/linux-fsdevel/20260514062955.1183976-5-yi.zhang@huaweicloud.com/

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new helper function, iomap_folio_mark_uptodate(), to mark a folio as uptodate and update its uptodate bitmap if the folio has iomap state data attached. This is necessary for filesystems like fuse that need to mark a folio as uptodate outside of conventional iomap calls.
